codeReview.summary: The integration tests implementation fully covers all 3 validation contract assertions (VAL-TEST-098, VAL-TEST-099, VAL-TEST-100). The tests are well-structured with proper use of conditional execution via the `itIf` helper that gracefully skips database-dependent tests when PostgreSQL is unavailable. The implementation includes both backend integration tests (server/test/integration.test.ts - 878 lines, 11 test cases) and frontend session persistence tests (auth-client.test.ts additions - 170 lines, 3 test cases). Tests verify database state changes, transaction behavior, and concurrent race conditions correctly.

summary: Integration tests implementation is complete and well-executed. All 3 validation assertions are covered: VAL-TEST-098 (claim/listing status consistency - 4 test cases), VAL-TEST-099 (concurrent claims race condition - 3 test cases), and VAL-TEST-100 (auth session persistence - 3 test cases). Tests properly use conditional execution when database is unavailable, making them suitable for CI environments without a test database. The handoff confirms all verification steps passed including typecheck, lint, and test execution.
